# `web_selectOption`

Select one or more options from a <select> dropdown element identified by its element ID, ARIA descriptor, or CSS selector.
Provide the option values or labels to select.

## Source

- Kind: class-backed
- Class: `xyz.block.trailblaze.playwright.tools.PlaywrightNativeSelectOptionTool`

## Contract

- Visible to LLM: yes (`surface_to_llm: true`)
- Recordable: yes (`is_recordable: true`)
- Host-only: no (`requires_host: false`)

## Input schema

### Required parameters

- `values` — `ToolParameterType.List(
  itemsType =
    String
)`
  The option values or visible text labels to select.

### Optional parameters

- `ref` — `String`
  Element ID (e.g., 'e5'), ARIA descriptor (e.g., 'combobox "Category"'), or CSS selector with css= prefix (e.g., 'css=#my-select').
- `reasoning` — `String`

## Output

Returns: `string` (opaque text content)

Typed result schemas (`kind: query | action`, MCP `structuredContent`) are not yet carried by the resolved manifest — this section will gain detail when that lands.
